text.title: Objection Bank Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: ≥10 sales conversations AND FAQ surface AND weekly cadence committed?

branch.when: conversations_count >= 10 AND faq_surface_exists == true AND weekly_cadence_committed == true
